description.value:
Archetype

Your wolf nature reaches its physical pinnacle. You gain the following permanent benefits (suppressed while Sea-Bound):

  • While in Hybrid or Full Wolf Form: You gain resistance to physical damage equal to your level (minimum 5), as your hide becomes supernaturally tough.
  • Your Hybrid Form Speed bonus increases from +10 to +20 feet. Your Full Wolf Form land Speed becomes at least 60 feet.
  • Your bite Strikes gain the brutal and deadly d12 traits.
description.gm: The physical resistance is mechanically enforced via the Resistance rule element predicated on wolf-human:hybrid-form OR wolf-human:beast-form (set by the effect items). The speed upgrades are described in text — manually update the Wolf: Hybrid Form and Wolf: Full Beast Form effects when this feat is gained, or apply the bonus as an additional effect.
